# Context Delivery Plan — RAG Refinement System

**Version:** 1.0
**Date:** 2026-06-06
**Phase:** 1.5 — Context Engineering (sub-pipeline step; replaces main-pipeline Phase A.5)
**Author:** context-engineering-agent
**Precondition:** `hld.md` consensus verdict = APPROVED (zero open items).

> Purpose: define per-agent **token budgets** and **Differential GSD (Ground-State Delta) chunk names** so each downstream Phase B agent receives exactly the context it needs — no more. Every Phase B+ agent prompt MUST carry `Context Budget: {N} tokens | Sources: [...]` (ENFORCEMENT RULES, `_common_context.md`). Missing budget = invalid prompt.

---

## 1. Differential GSD Chunk Catalog

Differential GSD chunks are minimal, named context deltas sliced from the APPROVED HLD + PRD. Agents receive **only** the chunks they need, not the full HLD. Each chunk is a stable, addressable slice.

| Chunk name | Content (delta) | Source section | Approx tokens |
|------------|-----------------|----------------|--------------:|
| **auth-schema-delta** | Auth model: API key + rotation (enterprise), OAuth2/JWT (personal); secret-manager injection | HLD §7.2/§7.3, ADR-7, NFR-015 | 600 |
| **router-contract-delta** | Router output shape `{relevant_sections[], page_ranges[], confidence[], fallback, routing_time_ms, rationale}`; in-process async; never calls generation LLM; confidence thresholds | HLD §7.1, ADR-1/ADR-3, FR-005/009 | 900 |
| **pg-schema-delta** | `documents` + `sections` DDL; page-range authority; `tenant_id`/`residency_region`/`pii_flags`/`fallback_only` columns | HLD §4.2, ADR-10 | 700 |
| **qdrant-payload-delta** | Qdrant point payload `{chunk_id, section_id, doc_id, page, tenant_id}`; retrieval filter `section_id IN (...) AND tenant_id` | HLD §4.3, ADR-2, FR-006 | 500 |
| **api-contract-delta** | `/v1/route` (req/resp), `/v1/answer` (SSE final event), DPDP endpoints; RFC-7807; OpenAPI 3.1 | HLD §7.2-§7.5, ADR-5, NFR-010 | 1100 |
| **ingestion-pipeline-delta** | `ingest_document(doc)→{doc_id,toc}`; parse tier A/B/C; section-aware chunk; content-hash dedup; idempotency | HLD §3.1/§6, ADR-4/ADR-6, FR-001..004 | 900 |
| **toc-dsa-delta** | TOC interval tree (page→section), LRU TOC cache, confidence-thresholded top-K | HLD §6, NFR-001 | 600 |
| **dpdp-compliance-delta** | Erasure cascade (outbox+sweep), access endpoint, no-retention path, residency, x-pii | HLD §7.4/§11 (OAQ-1,2,5,6), FR-025..029, NFR-014 | 900 |
| **threat-model-delta** | STRIDE + OWASP LLM Top-10 map; prompt-injection strict-JSON; embedding-inversion ACL; IDOR/tenant checks | HLD §8, NFR-008 | 800 |
| **frontend-contract-delta** | SSE token stream + final event consumption; confidence meter reads `routing.confidence[]`; explainability panel reads `rationale` | HLD §7.3, ADR-9, FR-007/008/011/012/018 | 700 |
| **fallback-graph-delta** | LangGraph conditional branch; `fallback_only` ingestion flag + query-time `fallback:true`; full-doc RAG node | HLD §3.2/§11 (OAQ-6), ADR-3, FR-009, NFR-013 | 600 |

---

## 2. Per-Agent Token Budgets (Phase B downstream)

Budgets follow the project convention (Phase B implementation agents ~12-16K; Phase A/design ~20K). Each agent receives only its listed GSD chunks plus the shared ADR header.

| Phase B agent | Context budget | GSD chunks delivered | Primary FRs |
|---------------|---------------:|----------------------|-------------|
| **database-engineer** (TODO-10 foundation) | 12,000 | pg-schema-delta, qdrant-payload-delta, dpdp-compliance-delta | FR-003/004/025/027 |
| **data-engineer** (TODO-11 ingestion) | 14,000 | ingestion-pipeline-delta, pg-schema-delta, qdrant-payload-delta, toc-dsa-delta | FR-001/002/003/004 |
| **ai-engineer** (TODO-11 router) | 16,000 | router-contract-delta, toc-dsa-delta, fallback-graph-delta, threat-model-delta | FR-005/009, NFR-008 |
| **python-backend-engineer** (TODO-11 API) | 16,000 | api-contract-delta, auth-schema-delta, router-contract-delta, qdrant-payload-delta, dpdp-compliance-delta, threat-model-delta | FR-006/007/008/010/018/025/026 |
| **react-engineer** (TODO-12 frontend) | 12,000 | frontend-contract-delta, api-contract-delta, auth-schema-delta | FR-007/008/011/012/018 |
| **devops-engineer** (TODO-10 ops) | 10,000 | auth-schema-delta, dpdp-compliance-delta (residency), threat-model-delta | NFR-007/009/015 |

**Shared header (all agents):** the 10 ADRs (compressed, ~1,500 tokens) + the relevant AGREED CONTRACTS lines. This is additive to each agent's budget and is the only context shared across all Phase B agents.

---

## 3. Delivery Rules

1. **No full-HLD delivery.** Agents receive named GSD chunks only; the full HLD is the consensus artifact, not a runtime context.
2. **section_id is the universal key.** Every chunk touching retrieval/joins references `section_id` consistently; no agent reinvents the key.
3. **Budget enforcement.** Each Phase B prompt header must read `Context Budget: {N} tokens | Sources: [chunk-names]`. Missing = invalid prompt (ENFORCEMENT RULES).
4. **Delta freshness.** If the HLD is amended post-APPROVED, the affected GSD chunk is re-sliced and its token estimate updated before re-delivery; downstream agents re-run from the new delta.
5. **No contradiction with ADRs.** GSD chunks carry decisions, never re-open them. An agent that needs an ADR rationale gets the ADR shared header, not a re-derivation.

---

*Context Delivery Plan v1.0 | RAG Refinement System | Phase 1.5 | 2026-06-06*
